case_title: LUTTJOHANN HEIDI VS WOODS CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LUTTJOHANN HEIDI AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS CONSTRUCTION CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-03-1996, GRANTED
